predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person (the deceased). This status may be directly asserted by a case.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_descendants_or_adopted_children
predicates.description: The deceased leaves descendants, adopted children, or descendants of adopted children.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_ascendants_or_close_collaterals
predicates.description: The deceased leaves relatives in the ascending line or close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_other_or_no_heirs
predicates.description: The deceased leaves only other heirs or no heirs at all.

predicates.name: asset_is_in_common_estate
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the common matrimonial estate of the deceased.

predicates.name: asset_is_in_exclusive_undivided_estate
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the estate held exclusively in undivided co-ownership between the spouses.

predicates.name: asset_is_in_own_estate
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the deceased's own (separate) estate, excluding common and exclusive undivided assets.

predicates.name: asset_subject_to_legal_return
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal return as referred to in article 4.24 or 4.25.

predicates.name: deed_or_testament_excludes_usufruct_on_return_asset
predicates.description: The deed of gift or testament provides otherwise regarding the usufruct on the asset subject to legal return.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires usufruct of the entire estate of the deceased.

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership_of_common_share
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires full ownership of the deceased's share in the common and exclusive undivided estate.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_own_estate_assets
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires usufruct of the remaining assets in the deceased's own estate.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_legal_return_asset
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires usufruct over the specific asset subject to legal return of the deceased.

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires full ownership of the entire estate of the deceased.

predicates.name: par1_scenario_applies
predicates.description: The scenario of paragraph 1 applies: the deceased leaves descendants or adopted children.

predicates.name: par2_scenario_applies
predicates.description: The scenario of paragraph 2 applies: the deceased leaves ascendants or close collaterals but no descendants or adopted children.

predicates.name: par3_scenario_applies
predicates.description: The scenario of paragraph 3 applies: the deceased leaves other heirs or no heirs, and neither par1 nor par2 applies.
